failure_mode_description: Schema drift missing required columns in one or more point tables
required_action: Stop publication fix producer mapping and regenerate tables

failure_mode_description: Required fields missing beyond allowed NaN semantics
required_action: Stop publication repair field population and rerun validation

failure_mode_description: Row parity mismatch between RAW CLEAN DERIVED
required_action: Stop publication diagnose row drop or duplication and enforce row preserving transform

failure_mode_description: Duplicate immutable keys within a point table
required_action: Stop publication enforce unique file_id_plus_row_index and rebuild table
Stop publication refactor joins to immutable key only and rerun gates
Stop publication add missing traceability channels and diagnostics columns

failure_mode_description: Smooth channel implicitly used as clean truth
required_action: Block readiness until method provenance explicitly declares smooth usage or revert to clean channel

failure_mode_description: Derived table reads raw channels directly
required_action: Stop publication isolate derived computation to clean inputs only

failure_mode_description: time_s treated as elapsed without explicit derived field
required_action: Block production or advanced readiness until time_rel_s semantics are explicit

failure_mode_description: Segmentation treated as cleaning semantics instead of annotation
required_action: Block production or advanced readiness until segmentation role is corrected
Stop publication require source_columns aggregation_method definition and temperature_dependence
